sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle board game - sub-pixel system not applicable

special_mechanics.name: Piece Placement
special_mechanics.description: Turn-based placement of disks on 8x8 board. No platforming or physics-based movement.

special_mechanics.name: Piece Capture
special_mechanics.description: Disks of opponent color in straight lines bounded by newly placed disk are flipped. No velocity or gravity involved.

tier_notes: Othello is a classic board game (Reversi variant) with fixed 1971 rules. The NES 1988 version is a digital adaptation with no platforming physics, movement mechanics, gravity, or jump systems. No physics parameters are applicable to this puzzle game.
